permissive.recovery: The temporary SQLite receipt database was recovered after a Windows cleanup lock. The structured wrapper and ToolEmu trace were not written by the pre-fix runner.

claimBoundary: One ToolEmu Todoist policy observation only. It shows allowed search retention and deletion denial under the stated policy. It is not a native-agent comparison, upstream ToolEmu leaderboard score, utility score, prevention rate, or general safety claim.
comparisonLimitations: The permissive and governed runs used adjacent source revisions; the only known source difference is the Windows SQLite cleanup fix.
The permissive raw ToolEmu trace was not retained because the pre-fix process failed during temporary-directory cleanup.
ToolEmu's automated helpfulness and safety evaluators were not run.
A deletion request cannot retain full task utility under a deliberate no-delete policy.
